title: Smoky Roasted Croatian Goats Cheese Bowl
description: A pescatarian friendly Croatian dish featuring roasted goats cheese, served in an earthenware bowl, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 200 degrees Celsius
In a small bowl mix together smoked paprika, olive oil, lemon juice, and minced garlic
Place the goats cheese in the earthenware bowl and brush the paprika mixture on top
Roast the goats cheese in the oven for 15 minutes or until slightly browned
While the cheese is roasting toss the cherry tomatoes in a little olive oil and season with sea salt
Add the cherry tomatoes to the oven and roast for an additional 5 minutes
Steam the mixed greens using a mushimono steam method until slightly wilted
To assemble the dish place the roasted goats cheese in the center of the earthenware bowl, surround with steamed mixed greens and top with roasted cherry tomatoes
